data_description.base_url: Do not edit this URL, even if your dealer uses their own app (e.g. ADT, Brinks). Only change this if you are a developer and know what you are doing.

two_factor_method.title: Send Verification Code
two_factor_method.description: Choose how you'd like to receive your verification code.

trust_device.title: Trust This Device
trust_device.description: Would you like to trust this device to skip two-factor authentication in the future?

reauth.title: Re-authenticate Alarm.com
reauth.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your password.

error.invalid_code: Verification code is incorrect or has expired. Request a new code and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Alarm.com. Please try again.
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Enter a hostname (e.g. alarm.com) or full URL (e.g. https://alarm.com).
error.otp_send_failed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Alarm.com account is already configured.
abort.must_configure_mfa: Your Alarm.com account requires two-factor authentication to be configured. Please log in at alarm.com and set up 2FA first.
